# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

We support security updates for the following versions of WinNest:

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| >=0.1.x | :white_check_mark: |
| <0.1.0  | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

We take the security of WinNest seriously. If you find a security vulnerability, please do not open a public issue. Instead, report it directly to the maintainer:

*   **Email**: [lhqminh.dev@gmail.com](mailto:lhqminh.dev@gmail.com)

Please include:
*   A description of the vulnerability.
*   A proof of concept (PoC) or steps to reproduce the issue.
*   The potential impact of the vulnerability.

We will acknowledge receipt of your report within 48 hours and work with you to resolve the issue in a timely manner. We appreciate your coordination in keeping the project secure.
